_note: PSE (Philippine Stock Exchange) non-trading days. The briefing skips these dates plus all weekends. Source: Malacanang Proclamation No. 1006 (2026) + PSE annual market-holiday list. Eid'l Fitr/Eid'l Adha dates are ESTIMATES until the official Malacanang proclamation fixes them (they follow the lunar calendar); verify and correct when released. Update yearly: add the next year's block from the new PSE circular / proclamation.
